notes: Topbar height is 56px with transparent surface over white/near-black page.
Desktop left sidebar consumes about 264px; content starts near x=337 at 1280px and near x=328 at 1440px.
Primary accent is rgb(131, 110, 249) used for active nav, TOC rail, focused AI input, and small icons.
Sidebar links are 14px/20px with 12px radius and 6px vertical padding.
Assistant desktop sheet is a right-side panel around 360px wide with 16px radius and hairline border.
Mobile collapses the sidebar into a 56px breadcrumb/navigation row under the topbar.
